description_long: This is a high-caliber sniper rifle featuring a long, black metallic barrel with a prominent suppressor attached at the muzzle. The rifle is equipped with a wooden fixed stock and a detachable box magazine, with several large-caliber cartridges visible nearby. A precision scope is mounted on top, indicating its use for long-range targeting. The rifle rests on a sturdy bipod, enhancing stability for accurate shooting. The overall design combines wood and metal, giving it a classic yet tactical appearance. The visible cartridges and robust construction suggest it is intended for powerful, precise shots in urban or open environments.
description: A long-barreled sniper rifle with a wooden stock, mounted scope, suppressor, and bipod, accompanied by large-caliber cartridges. The design blends classic wood with tactical black metal components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, mounted scope, bipod, and several cartridges beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, bipod legs, and a single cartridge positioned to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, scope, bipod, and four cartridges lined up in front.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock, bipod, and a cartridge to the side, with the scope and suppressor visible in alignment.
